info.name: Project Radeon Backend API
info.description: Route-complete Postman collection for the Project Radeon backend mounted in cmd/api/main.go. Set {{base_url}}, call Register or Login to populate {{token}}, then use the protected requests. The chats WebSocket entry is included as an endpoint reference and expects the access token in the query string.

exec: const request = json.data && json.data.request ? json.data.request : json.data;

request.description: Reference entry for the authenticated WebSocket endpoint. Use a WebSocket client against this URL rather than a normal HTTP request.
